name: CAD Bootcamp Graduate
quote: The program made parametric modeling feel structured. I now build parts with cleaner sketches, stronger feature trees, and more confidence preparing for certification.

name: Mechanical Design Learner
quote: The advanced assembly sessions helped me understand how professional CAD files are organized, reviewed, and prepared for real production work.

name: Simulation Track Student
quote: The mentor feedback was direct and practical. I learned how to explain assumptions, inspect mesh quality, and make better design decisions from simulation results.

name: Engineering Team Lead
quote: The training gave our team a clearer modeling standard and a more reliable way to review CAD files before they move into manufacturing discussions.
